name: Hidden Valley Ranch Quiche Lorraine
recipeIngredient: 1 cup grated Swiss or Cheddar cheese
1 slice ham, cut into small chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Sprinkle half a cup of cheese into the pie crust.
3. Whisk the eggs.
4. Add the other ingredients, including the remaining half cup of cheese, to the whisked eggs.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
6. Place the mixture in the pie shell.
7. Bake for 15 minutes at 400 degrees.
8. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees and bake an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the center is set.
